examples: EXPERT Rabbi Dovid Goldwasser of Brooklyn counsels women all over the world on eating disorders.

Back in 2002, Andrew VanWyngarden and Ben Goldwasser formed the electronic-rock duo known as MGMT.
It's often difficult to make out what Van Wyngarden and Goldwasser are saying, but it works on a record where the vocals are primarily a vehicle for melody.
